purpose: Formal contract for every write to any SSOT file. Every change is one transaction: identified, hashed before/after, receipt-linked, attributable, and reversible by rule. Source of truth for the rule referenced by architecture_plan_fact_gap.json ssot_update_protocol.

transaction_required_fields.state_change_id: uuid4, generated per transaction, never reused
transaction_required_fields.trace_id: links to the task/dispatch event that caused this change
transaction_required_fields.target_ssot_file: exact repo path of the file being changed
transaction_required_fields.pre_state_hash: sha256 of target file content immediately before change
transaction_required_fields.post_state_hash: sha256 of target file content immediately after change
transaction_required_fields.receipt_ref: path to governance/proofs/ file justifying this change; MUST exist before transaction is considered valid
transaction_required_fields.applied_by: role, not persona — Curator-Executor | Auditor | External Auditor | Operator

validity_rule: A change to any file listed in ssot_canonical_files (see ssot_precedence_order.json) without a corresponding entry in governance/state/ssot_transaction_log.jsonl bearing all 9 fields above is INVALID and must be flagged STATE_INCONSISTENT by the next auditor pass.
